abstract: A value that indicates a failure other than trust evaluation.
overview:
## Discussion

This value indicates that evaluation failed for some other reason. This can be caused by either a revoked certificate or by OS-level errors that are unrelated to the certificates themselves.

You might receive the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTrustResultType/otherError] value after an evaluation, but you can’t store the value as part of the user trust settings with a call to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTrustSettingsSetTrustSettings(_:_:_:)] method.

# SecTrustResultType.otherError

**Case**

A value that indicates a failure other than trust evaluation.

## Declaration

```swift
case otherError
```

## Discussion

This value indicates that evaluation failed for some other reason. This can be caused by either a revoked certificate or by OS-level errors that are unrelated to the certificates themselves.

You might receive the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTrustResultType/otherError] value after an evaluation, but you can’t store the value as part of the user trust settings with a call to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTrustSettingsSetTrustSettings(_:_:_:)] method.
title: SecTrustResultType.otherError
